content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 23, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 23, 2026, focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud infrastructure and expanding agent capabilities. Key achievements include porting the Sol/Steward cloud bridge to the main repository and resolving a critical production KMS error affecting SIWE signups.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Agent Integration**
*   Ported the Sol/Steward Eliza Cloud bridge from the `0xSolace/milady-cloud` repository into `elizaos/eliza`.
*   Implemented JWT mint routes and Steward plugin installation support to enable Eliza Cloud agents to receive data ([#7894](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7894)).

**Production Security & Stability**
*   Resolved a P0 production incident causing HTTP 500 errors during SIWE signups on `api.elizacloud.ai`.
*   Fixed the KMS local-backend to utilize a persistent root key for production environments ([#7920](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7920)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7905](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7905): chore(os): mint SLSA build provenance attestation for ISO.
*   [#7895](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7895): fix(core): preserve speaker names in prior dialogue context.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
